Please describe your grid first. Then, I will provide my description and we can ask each other questions about the grids to figure out whether they are the same. Now start your short grid description with "DESCRIPTION:" followed by the description. Do not add anything else. This is your grid:

action.content: DESCRIPTION: A 5×5 grid. X’s form a mostly solid left border and a full right border, with X’s at all four corners. The interior has a diagonal from near top-left toward bottom-right made of X’s: (row2,col2), (row3,col3), (row4,col4). Additionally there are X’s at (row1,col1), (row1,col5), (row2,col1), (row2,col5), (row3,col1), (row3,col5), (row4,col1), (row4,col4), (row4,col5), (row5,col1), (row5,col5); all other cells are blanks.
action.label: response
